description: This file defines a service for generating role recommendations based on a final persona, including a default roles catalog, scoring, and filtering logic, and functions for fetching and processing persona data.

methods.name: _normStr
methods.description: Normalizes a string by trimming and converting to lowercase.

methods.name: _uniqNorm
methods.description: Returns a list of unique, normalized strings from an array.

methods.name: _roleTitleTokens
methods.description: Splits and filters role title into meaningful tokens, removing common words.

methods.name: _roleTitleOverlapCount
methods.description: Counts overlapping tokens between two role titles.

methods.name: _seniorityRank
methods.description: Assigns a numeric rank to seniority levels for comparison.

methods.name: _matchesProgression
methods.description: Determines if a persona's current role and seniority align with a target role's seniority levels.

methods.name: _buildMatchReason
methods.description: Generates a reason string for role matching based on skills, industry, title, and progression.

methods.name: _ensureSeededIfEmpty
methods.description: Seeds the roles repository with default roles if empty.

methods.name: _deriveUserSkillsForScoring
methods.description: Extracts user skills with proficiency from a persona object for scoring purposes.

methods.name: getRoleRecommendationsFromFinalPersona
methods.description: Main function to generate role recommendations based on a final persona, including filtering, scoring, and ranking logic.
